# About Our Company

We are a technology company focused on making the web more discoverable by AI answer engines.

## Our Mission

To democratize access to AI optimization tools and help content creators reach wider audiences through emerging AI platforms.

## Our Team

Founded in 2024, our team consists of experienced developers, SEO specialists, and AI researchers passionate about the future of search.
